case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. MARIA GUADALUPE CALDERA REYES

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,385.32 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT REYES, MARIA GUADALUPE CALDERA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-11-2018 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $55.00) SERVED FEB-15-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT REYES, MARIA GUADALUPE CALDERA

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY MARIA BLANC, LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF REQUESTS MATTER TO BE DISMISSED W/O PREJUDICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)
